title: Perform complex tests to measure chemical properties of materials
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform complex tests to measure chemical properties of materials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Develop an analysis plan with supervisor

pcs.text: Liaise with client or sample provider to determine test requirements and sample characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client or sample provider to determine test requirements and sample characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client or sample provider to determine test requirements and sample characteristics.

pcs.text: Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm suitable sample preparation methods, quantification and analytical techniques with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm suitable sample preparation methods, quantification and analytical techniques with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm suitable sample preparation methods, quantification and analytical techniques with supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop an analysis plan with supervisor

elements.title: Reduce the complexity of the sample

pcs.text: Obtain a representative analytical portion of the laboratory sample
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain a representative analytical portion of the laboratory sample?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain a representative analytical portion of the laboratory sample.

pcs.text: Prepare validation checks for analytical portions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare validation checks for analytical portions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare validation checks for analytical portions.

pcs.text: Use workplace procedures to simplify the sample matrix
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use workplace procedures to simplify the sample matrix?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use workplace procedures to simplify the sample matrix.

pcs.text: Conduct tests to ensure that sample preparation is complete
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct tests to ensure that sample preparation is complete?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct tests to ensure that sample preparation is complete.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Reduce the complexity of the sample

elements.title: Apply quantification method

pcs.text: Add modifiers to remove or minimise interferences
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Add modifiers to remove or minimise interferences?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Add modifiers to remove or minimise interferences.

pcs.text: Conduct preliminary analysis to estimate analyte concentration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct preliminary analysis to estimate analyte concentration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct preliminary analysis to estimate analyte concentration.

pcs.text: Match the concentration of analyte in the sample with the working range of the instrument
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match the concentration of analyte in the sample with the working range of the instrument?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match the concentration of analyte in the sample with the working range of the instrument.

pcs.text: Prepare calibration standards to suit quantification method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare calibration standards to suit quantification method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare calibration standards to suit quantification method.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply quantification method

elements.title: Perform analysis

pcs.text: Set up and optimise instruments to suit sample and test requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up and optimise instruments to suit sample and test requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up and optimise instruments to suit sample and test requirements.

pcs.text: Measure analyte response for standards, validation checks and samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure analyte response for standards, validation checks and samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure analyte response for standards, validation checks and samples.

pcs.text: Conduct sufficient measurements to obtain reliable data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct sufficient measurements to obtain reliable data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct sufficient measurements to obtain reliable data.

pcs.text: Return instruments to standby or shutdown condition in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return instruments to standby or shutdown condition in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return instruments to standby or shutdown condition in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Perform analysis

elements.title: Process, analyse and record data

pcs.text: Confirm data is the result of valid measurements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm data is the result of valid measurements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm data is the result of valid measurements.

pcs.text: Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with estimations and expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with estimations and expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with estimations and expectations.

pcs.text: Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision units and uncertainty
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision units and uncertainty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision units and uncertainty.

pcs.text: Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Troubleshoot analytical procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Troubleshoot analytical procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Troubleshoot analytical procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results.

pcs.text: Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Process, analyse and record data
